title: Dictionary App
description: A comprehensive dictionary application built with Kotlin featuring word search, definitions, and pronunciation guides.

title: Square Room
description: An interactive 3D square room environment built in Unity with realistic physics and visual effects.

title: Amazon Clone
description: A fully functional e-commerce platform replicating Amazon's design and user interface with modern web technologies.

title: ODAC - Object Detection & Classification
description: An AI-powered system for real-time object detection and classification using CCTV cameras. Implemented with machine learning for educational environments.

title: HopeSpring
description: A social chat platform where users connect and communicate in real time through a clean, community-driven environment.

title: Resume Builder
description: A full-stack AI-powered resume builder with user authentication, live editing, image upload, and one-click PDF export. Built with React, MongoDB, OpenAI, and deployed on Vercel and Render.

title: Data Warehouse
description: A structured data warehousing solution designed to efficiently store and query large volumes of data for business intelligence and analytics reporting.

title: Hotel Management Network
description: A complete network topology designed for a hotel environment, ensuring efficient communication and data exchange between all departments using Cisco technologies.

title: Network Design & Security
description: Designed and secured TechSafe Ltd's full network infrastructure — including subnetting, Wireshark traffic analysis, and firewall configuration to defend against cyber threats.
